% check a.php
a.php:11:13: class property Repo::notExist does not exist
a.php:13:18: class Instance not found

% check b.php
b.php:3:10: class DoesNotExist not found

% check c.php
c.php:6:10: property foo has non-existing type UnknownClass

# In the following case, we want all the places we refer
# to the non-existing class.
% check d.php
d.php:3:18: class Module\Foo not found
d.php:4:18: class Module\Foo not found

-- a.php --
<?php

$repo = new Repo;
$x = $repo->get();

$x->foo;
$x->bar;
$x->name;
$x->baz;

$x = $repo->notExist->doesNotExistEither();

$repo->instance->conn->getID();
-- d.php --
<?php

class Repo extends Mysql
{
	public function get()
	{
	}
}
-- m.php --
<?php

/**
 * @property Instance $instance
 */
class Mysql
{
}
-- b.php --
<?php

$x = new DoesNotExist;
$x->foo;
$x->bar;
-- c.php --
<?php

class Baz
{
	/** @var UnknownClass */
	private $foo;

	function process(): void
	{
		$this->foo->doNotReportThis();
	}
}
-- d.php --
<?php

$x = Module\Foo::BAR;
$x = Module\Foo::BAZ;
